transcript: Hey guys! For the first video of the year, I'm excited to share with you the process of making this lovely paper grilling heart. I hope it can inspire you to make something beautiful for a loved one or even for your very own home. Now, without any further ado, let's get to work! Thank you. Teksting av Nicolai Winther Gå inn i fjellet, og ta bort fjellet. Thank you.
